command.description: Shell command to execute via /bin/bash -c. Supports the full POSIX feature set including pipes

cwd.description: Working directory for the command. Relative paths resolve against the session cwd; defaults to the session cwd when omitted.

env_overrides.description: Environment variables to set. Empty value removes the variable. Merged on top of the parent process environment.

stdin.description: Standard input to pipe into the command; empty string means /dev/null.

timeout_sec.description: Wall-clock timeout in seconds; default 60; clamped to [1
